name: Audio File Media Source
description: The `audio_file` media source platform plays audio files that have been embedded into the firmware using the [Audio File](https://esphome.io/components/audio_file/) component.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID for this media source.

config_entries.label: File
config_entries.description: Path to audio file. Can be a local file path or a URL.
